Exclusion One 
The session at Indooroopilly State High School on the 4th of May is cancelled for all Year 
Levels due to Open Day 
 
Exclusion Two 
The session at Loreto College on the 2nd of May is cancelled for all Year Levels due to 
Parent Teacher Interviews. 
 
Exclusion Three 
The session at Cannon Hill Anglican College on the 3rd of May is cancelled for Years 12 
and 10 due to School Camp. Year 11’s will still attend the session.
